title: pouzolzia indica subvar. muralis
intro: Pouzolzia indica subvar. muralis, also known as the Indian nettle or kalmegh, is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouzolzia indica subvar. muralis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. It can be prepared in various forms such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is often consumed as a tea or added to herbal supplements.
